it:54.3: "Tisso imā, bhikkhave, esanā. Katamā tisso? Kāmesanā, bhavesanā, brahmacariyesanā – imā kho, bhikkhave, tisso esanā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:54.4:
"Samāhito sampajāno,
sato buddhassa sāvako;
Esanā ca pajānāti,
esanānañca sambhavaṁ.
it:54.5:
Yattha cetā nirujjhanti,
maggañca khayagāminaṁ;
Esanānaṁ khayā bhikkhu,
nicchāto parinibbuto"ti.
it:54.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Pañcamaṁ.
